untranslatable_reason: Descending Broadening Wedge pattern formation itself (expanding lower highs and lower lows structure) cannot be reliably detected with available indicators. The pattern requires multi-bar structural analysis tracking the divergence of upper and lower trend lines, which exceeds the scope of single-bar indicator conditions. Volume regime differentiation (bull vs bear market context) also requires market regime detection beyond provided indicators. Converted entry conditions approximate breakout behavior, but core pattern identification is not mathematically expressible.
